subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! May thou, through the bounties of the Lord of Names, be made victorious and illumined by the lights of His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رضا انشاء الله بعنایت مالک اسماء فائز باشی و بانوار وجهش منور این اسم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @high station of the true believer
